intro: Import staged source files into the Studio, Analysis, or Library docs source.
include_prompt_meta_hint: When enabled, clearly identifiable prompt/meta sections are kept as wrapped quoted prose.
service_unavailable: Docs management service unavailable. Start bin/dev-studio to run imports.
idle_status: Select a staged source file and import it into Studio, Analysis, or Library docs.
load_files_failed: Failed to load staged import files.
no_files: No supported staged import files found under var/docs/import-staging/.
overwrite_required: Overwrite required: {doc_id} ({title}). Review the warning and confirm if you want to replace it.
collision_body: This import matches an existing doc target. Confirm overwrite to replace the current source while keeping the same doc identity and filename.
filename_conflict_body: A source file named {doc_id}.md already exists. Edit the doc_id to choose a new filename.
replacement_title_body: This staged file matches an existing doc filename. Enter a replacement doc_id, then run import again.
